overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a hooded character exploring the ruined Cathedral of Manus Celes. The character walks through atmospheric gothic ruins covered in ivy, transitioning from enclosed archways to an open clifftop with floating rocks and celestial light beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral entrance with ivy-covered stone arches

events.description: location name 'Cathedral of Manus Celes' appears on screen as character enters the area

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps and through the outer gothic arches into the cathedral grounds

entered.detail: large pointed stone archway covered in hanging ivy vines
stone wall densely covered in green ivy and climbing plants
weathered stone steps leading up into the cathedral
tree with golden-yellow foliage standing among the ruins
tall gothic cathedral structure with broken windows and spires

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Cathedral of Manus Celes, walking up stone steps through a gothic archway covered in ivy. The location name appears on screen as the character enters the semi-covered entrance area, with the massive cathedral ruins visible ahead against an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral nave with towering gothic arches

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive central archway beneath the ruined cathedral towers

entered.detail: enormous ornate stone archway forming the main entrance to the cathedral interior
tall broken spires and towers rising above the cathedral structure
collapsed stone balconies and walkways on the cathedral walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the grand nave of the cathedral, passing beneath massive gothic arches and broken spires. The stone path continues through the semi-enclosed space, with ornate architectural details visible on the towering walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cathedral interior transitioning to ritual area with stone bowl

events.description: ambient light dims significantly as character moves into the darker interior section of the ruins

agents.ego_description: navigating through darker, more enclosed ruins toward a glowing stone structure in the distance

entered.detail: shadowy passage between tall stone walls with limited sky visibility
massive carved stone basin or crucible on a tiered pedestal
vertical beams of bright blue-white light descending from the sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a darker, narrower section of the ruins where the lighting shifts to low light. The path opens toward an ancient stone bowl structure illuminated by celestial light beams descending from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: clifftop vista with floating rocks and descending light beams

events.description: exits enclosed ruins into open clifftop area with full sky visibility and celestial light beams
character transitions from walking to climbing up rocky terrain to reach the overlook

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky cliffside to reach the edge overlooking the floating cathedral ruins in the mist

entered.detail: massive floating stone pillars and cathedral fragments suspended in the misty air
expansive foggy valley with floating islands and distant spires
rocky precipice overlooking the vast floating landscape below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark ruins onto an open clifftop with the ancient stone bowl nearby. Celestial light beams descend around the area as the character climbs up rocky outcroppings to reach the cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking vista of floating rock formations and cathedral ruins suspended in the misty void.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the enclosed, ivy-clad entrance of a gothic cathedral into a vast, celestial void. It begins as the character ascends stone steps through a lush archway, moving from the semi-covered entrance toward the massive ruins under an overcast sky. As the camera advances, the scene expands into the grand nave, passing beneath towering gothic arches and broken spires before narrowing into a darker, low-light corridor. The path then opens toward an ancient stone bowl illuminated by descending beams of celestial light, which guide the character out of the shadows and onto an open clifftop. Finally, the camera climbs rocky outcroppings to reach the cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking vista of floating rock formations and suspended ruins drifting in a misty void.
